title: rosa × schleicheri var. rhodanii
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. rhodanii, also known as Rosa gallica or French rose, is a variety of rose plant that is native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to the presence of salicylic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × schleicheri var. rhodanii include its ability to aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with digestion and skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of rose petal tea, rose oil, and dried rose petals, which can be used to make infusions, salves, and other topical remedies.
